name: 90"x20" Table Runner Blue Striped - Threshold™
description:
Upgrade your dining table setting with this Striped Table Runner from Threshold™. The rectangular table runner features a white and blue striped pattern, adding a sophisticated style you'll love. The 100% cotton table runner helps protect your surface against scratches, spills and messes. Pair with coordinating napkins and placemats to create a stylish dining setup.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
